name: triad-territory-rush-online
description: Teacher-controlled nine-slot classroom game with three students per PC, team-name voting, random colors and AI replacement players.

scripts.test: node --check student-v3.js && node --check master-v3.js && node --check config.js && node --check server/server-v3.js && node --check server/moderation.js && node --check server/start.js && node server/moderation.test.js && node scripts/smoke-test.js && node scripts/runtime-test.js
